title: दुर्गा नवश्लोकी
devanagariText:
॥ श्री दुर्गा नवश्लोकी ॥

ज्ञानिनामपि चेतांसि देवी भगवती हि सा।
बलादाकृष्य मोहाय महामाया प्रयच्छति॥१॥

दुर्गे स्मृता हरसि भीतिमशेषजन्तोः
स्वस्थैः स्मृता मतिमतीव शुभां ददासि।
दारिद्र्यदुःखभयहारिणि का त्वदन्या
सर्वोपकारकरणाय सदार्द्रचित्ता॥२॥

सर्वमंगलमांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थसाधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यम्बके गौरि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥३॥

शरणागतदीनार्तपरित्राणपरायणे।
सर्वस्यार्तिहरे देवि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥४॥

सर्वस्वरूपे सर्वेशे सर्वशक्तिसमन्विते।
भयेभ्यस्त्राहि नो देवि दुर्गे देवि नमोऽस्तु ते॥५॥

रोगानशेषानपहंसि तुष्टा रुष्टा तु कामान् सकलानभीष्टान्।
त्वामाश्रितानां न विपन्नराणां त्वामाश्रिता ह्याश्रयतां प्रयान्ति॥६॥

सर्वबाधाप्रशमनं त्रैलोक्यस्याखिलेश्वरि।
एवमेव त्वया कार्यमस्मद्वैरिविनाशनम्॥७॥

सृष्टिस्थितिविनाशानां शक्तिभूते सनातनि।
गुणाश्रये गुणमये नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥८॥

यत्र यत्र रणेदैत्या दानवा दुर्विनीताः।
तत्र तत्र हि या देवी दुर्गामम्बा नमोऽस्तु ते॥९॥

॥ इति श्री मार्कण्डेयपुराणे दुर्गा नवश्लोकी सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Durga Nav Shloki ||

Jnaninam-api Chetamsi Devi Bhagavati Hi Sa.
Balad-akrishya Mohaya Maha-maya Prayachchhati.||1||

Durge Smrita Harasi Bhitim-ashesha-jantoh
Svasthaiah Smrita Matim-ativa Shubham Dadasi.
Daridrya-duhkha-bhaya-harini Ka Tvad-anya
Sarva-upakara-karanaya Sada-ardra-chitta.||2||

Sarva-mangala-mangalye Shive Sarvartha-sadhike.
Sharanye Tryambake Gauri Narayani Namostu Te.||3||

Sharana-agata-dina-arta-paritrana-parayane.
Sarvasya-arti-hare Devi Narayani Namostu Te.||4||

Sarva-svarupe Sarveshe Sarva-shakti-samanvite.
Bhayebhyas-trahi No Devi Durge Devi Namostu Te.||5||

Rogan-asheshan-apahamsi Tushta Rushta Tu Kaman Sakalan-abhishtan.
Tvam-ashritanam Na Vipanna-ranam Tvam-ashrita Hy-ashrayatam Prayanti.||6||

Sarva-badha-prashamanam Trailokya-syakhileshvari.
Evam-eva Tvaya Karyam Asmad-vairi-vinashanam.||7||

Srishti-sthiti-vinashanam Shakti-bhute Sanatani.
Guna-ashraye Guna-maye Narayani Namostu Te.||8||

Yatra Yatra Rane-daitya Danava Dur-vinitah.
Tatra Tatra Hi Ya Devi Durgam-amba Namostu Te.||9||

|| Iti Shri Markandeya Purane Durga Nav Shloki Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: वह भगवती देवी महामाया ज्ञानियों के चित्त को भी बलपूर्वक आकर्षित कर मोह में डालती है। हे दुर्गे! स्मरण करने पर प्राणियों का भय हरती हो, स्वस्थ चित्त से स्मरण करने पर अतिशुभ बुद्धि देती हो। दारिद्र्य-दुःख-भय हरने वाली तुम्हारे सिवा कौन है? सर्वमंगलमांगल्ये शिवे, शरणागत दीनार्त परित्राण परायणे, सर्वस्वरूपे, सर्वशक्तिसमन्विते — दुर्गा देवी को नमन।
benefits: Nine essential verses from the Durga Saptashati/Devi Mahatmya
Compact yet complete invocation of Goddess Durga's power
Removes all fears, poverty, sorrow, and diseases
Grants shubha-buddhi (auspicious intellect) to the reciter
Destroys enemies and pacifies all forms of suffering
Most popular condensed Durga prayer for daily recitation
description: Durga Nav Shloki — दुर्गा नवश्लोकी — is a sacred prayer offered to Goddess Durga. Rooted in Markandeya Purana / Devi Mahatmya, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Devotees recite this prayer to destroy enemies and pacify all forms of suffering and remove all fears, poverty, sorrow, and diseases. It is also said to grant shubha-buddhi (auspicious intellect) to the reciter. This prayer is traditionally recited on Tuesday (Mangalvar) and Friday (Shukravar) and during Navratri and Durga Puja to invoke divine grace. With 9 verses and a reading time of about 4 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Durga Nav Shloki in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Durga Nav Shloki - nine essential verses from Devi Mahatmya in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning for protection, prosperity, and fear removal.
